hook: Distance can feel magnetic partly because your mind keeps filling the silence with fantasy.
body: Ambiguity gives imagination far too much room, especially when attraction is already high.
voices: The School of Life, Psychology Today

hook: Some men call it mystery when what they are really reacting to is partial access and incomplete information.
body: Do not confuse the stimulation of uncertainty with the substance of a real bond.
voices: The School of Life, Psychology Today

hook: Do not confuse the stimulation of uncertainty with the substance of a real bond.
body: A person who is hard to read may occupy more mental space than a steady person who is actually better for you.
voices: The School of Life, Psychology Today

hook: A person who is hard to read may occupy more mental space than a steady person who is actually better for you.
body: If someone keeps your imagination busy, increase your attention to their actual behavior.
voices: The School of Life, Psychology Today
